caption: A presentation slide is displayed, featuring a dark blue, cosmic-themed background with glowing white interconnected nodes and lines resembling a digital network over a curved blue planetary horizon. The word "Backpressure" is written in a white, sans-serif font across the center of the screen. In the top right corner, a small inset video window shows a person with short dark hair and glasses, wearing a light-colored shirt, appearing to speak. The visual content remains completely static across all four sampled frames, with no movement in the background, no change in the on-screen text "Backpressure", and the person in the inset window maintaining a consistent appearance and position. No other objects, equipment, or logos are visible in the scene.
